summary: Iteration 11: Complete validation of Emailit integration, CMS bootstrap, sitemap localization, and admin back-office. All 23 backend tests passed, Playwright contact form and admin login tests passed. Emailit provider sends real emails successfully (HTTP 200 + success message).
critical_code_review_comments: Emailit integration is REAL (not mocked) - confirmed by HTTP 200 response with success message
Contact form displays success feedback 'Votre message a bien été envoyé' after submission
CMS bootstrap button 'Préremplir le site public' present in admin/pages
Sitemap.xml correctly generates locale-specific URLs based on Host header (FR, EN, DE verified)
Public chrome (topbar, header, footer) correctly localized for non-FR hosts
Admin routes properly protected with 307 redirect to login when unauthenticated

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Contact form submission + Admin login working

seed_data_creation: None - using existing CMS bootstrap data (81 pages, 9 menus, 5 home sections)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 11 request validated. Emailit email sending is REAL and working. Contact form UI shows success. Admin back-office accessible after login. Sitemap generates locale-specific URLs. Bootstrap button present in admin/pages. CMS content correctly consumed by /contact page.

features_tested.contact_api_emailit: PASS - Returns 200 with success message, real Emailit integration
features_tested.contact_form_ui_success: PASS - Success feedback displayed after form submission

features_tested.sitemap_de_locale: PASS - Returns XML with de.greeters.paris URLs via Host header
